title: Amtech A2315 100mm (4") Mattock Head
features: DURABLE: This 100mm (4") mattock head is made from strong, drop forged and heat treated steel and is compatible with Amtech's A2320 900mm (35") wooden handle
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening and decorating requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Do not forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
